texto: It's funny, the roles we play, the way we have to give up the old ones before we have room for the new ones. The first-first love stuff never goes away in here" she said, pointing to her head. "It makes you who you are. But in here," putting her hand on her chest, "time lets that grow and change. You'll see
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kristen-Paige Madonia sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “It's funny, the roles we play, the way we have to give up the old ones before we have room for th…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, coming-of-age, first-love, útil em momentos de mudanca e first-love.
